steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The conclusion claims nitrogen offsets moderate climate damage but not extreme change. We need data showing nitrogen is effective at moderate intensity but ineffective at extreme intensity.

steps.title: Verify the answer
steps.content:
Choice D pairs two key comparisons: with nitrogen at moderate (0.18) exceeds the current baseline without nitrogen (0.16) – nitrogen sustains growth despite moderate climate change; the baseline (0.16) exceeds with nitrogen at extreme (0.06) – nitrogen cannot sustain growth under extreme climate change. The other choices don't construct this paired comparison of moderate versus extreme to test nitrogen's variable effectiveness.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
